inputs.classification: operator-provided local seed; not committed as-is

outputs.change: Preferred v0.14 lineage with factory-empty embedded export and a host prompt-import bridge; byte-identical runtime mirror ships under noted-host/public.
Adds an iframe-only prompt snapshot proposal using noted.write and requiresApproval=true; byte-identical runtime mirror ships under noted-host/public.
Promotes the no-write stub to validated prompt creation with a reversible receipt bound to source envelope and snapshot references.
Loads the scrubbed v0.14 block, trusts only its iframe window, previews requests, and requires an operator click before IndexedDB mutation.
Shows saved prompt records so an approved import is operator-visible in the prompts UI.
Natural Phase 2 runner for ODS-AG-001 and ODS-PR-001, including factory scrub, preview gate, approval, IDB-backed UI visibility, and browser errors.
Regenerated single-file host artifact from the Phase 2 source.
Regenerated compatibility single-file host artifact from the Phase 2 source.

claims: The #/nexus-agent route loads the scrubbed v0.14 asset and its embedded-data payload contains empty tier1 and tier2 factory objects.
The committed Agent assets contain no embedded personal session, named test agent, selected provider, or hardcoded API key from the local seed.
A prompt snapshot from the tracked Agent iframe is previewed without mutation; only explicit approval writes through Noted createPrompt into the prompts IndexedDB store.
The approved prompt title appears in Prompt Studio and the import returns a receipt tied to the source envelope and prompt record.
Existing bridge:smoke and ODS-1 P0 behavior remains green in development, and ODS P0 remains green against production preview.
non_claims: This Phase 2 proposal is not production-ready and has status_authority NONE.
The scrub checklist and browser runner are not a full Nexus Agent security audit.
This does not implement Phase 3, Phase 4, Phase 5, broker queue UX, creature work, Nostr publishing, or sim-frame work.
This does not authorize tokens, real-world value, custody, redemption, or economic claims.
The Agent still depends on documented public CDNs and optional user-configured provider networking; a fully offline Agent bundle is not claimed.
TECH_SPEC §8.2 A4/A6 still require SEAT-GROK-DRIVE/operator manual acceptance; browser automation is runtime evidence, not operator acceptance.
The receipt is committed after the immutable verified product commit named by verified_at_commit; the receipt-only commit does not alter verified product files.

checks.result: Added and audited 166 packages; npm audit reported 5 vulnerabilities (1 low, 3 moderate, 1 high).
PASS; Vite transformed 304 modules and pack.js emitted both single-file artifacts.
PASS in dev mode with trusted and untrusted bridge assertions and zero console/page errors.
PASS in dev mode for all nine ODS-1 P0 cases.
PASS in preview mode for all nine ODS-1 P0 cases.
PASS ODS-AG-001 and ODS-PR-001 including approved prompt visibility in Prompt Studio.
PASS after generated node_modules was moved outside the repository worktree.

limitations: The first npm ci attempt inside the managed sandbox failed with EPERM when executing esbuild; the identical command passed after approved execution outside that sandbox.

Running repository doctor while node_modules was installed found dependency symlinks and permissive third-party JSON; the generated dependency directory was moved to /tmp and the full doctor/unit/verify sequence then passed.

The initial Phase 2 browser run proved the IndexedDB write and success receipt but exposed that Prompt Studio did not render saved Prompt records; Phase 2 added a bounded saved-record strip and the rerun passed.
npm audit reported five dependency findings; dependency remediation is outside this Phase 2 task.
next: NEXT: SEAT-GROK-DRIVE for TECH_SPEC §8.2 A4/A6 manual acceptance. Do not begin Phase 3.
